allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k in sorted\(deps\) if any\(x in k for x in ['pdf','canvas','react-pdf','sharp','jimp']\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in d.get\('dependencies',{}\).items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('optionalDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', d.get\('main'\)\); print\('type:', d.get\('type'\)\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in {**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('optionalDependencies',{}\)}.items\(\)]")
